title: benzoin aromaticum
intro: Benzoin aromaticum, also known as Styrax tonkinensis, is a plant species native to Asia, particularly in Vietnam and Laos. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of benzoin aromaticum include reducing pain and inflammation, relieving stress and anxiety, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, benzoin aromaticum is often used in essential oils, salves, and tinctures, and can be applied topically to soothe skin irritations and promote relaxation.
